page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc9i.large is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The instance is configured with 2 dedicated physical cores and 2 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention from other tenants.

The hardware profile includes 4.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. This lower RAM-to-CPU ratio aligns with compute-focused workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. The instance does not include local NVMe storage or GPU accelerators, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.hfc9i.large offers a streamlined entry point for compute-heavy tasks that require dedicated CPU resources rather than shared-core burstable performance. The dedicated Intel Xeon cores provide predictable execution times, though the lack of local storage and modest memory capacity represent clear tradeoffs for data-intensive applications. This instance is suited for lightweight web serving, microservices, CI/CD build agents, and basic application hosting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc9i.large is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs and 4.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.4 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, this KVM-based instance provides dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring consistent and predictable CPU performance. The instance lacks local storage and GPU acceleration, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. With a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.hfc9i.large is qualitatively cost-efficient for compute-focused workloads that do not demand large memory capacities. It is well-suited for lightweight web serving, microservices, and CI/CD build tasks.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core compute instance featuring high-frequency Intel Xeon processors and a balanced, low-memory footprint for predictable workloads.
